channel.title: Liberal National Party Queensland
channel.description: Facebook feed of the Queensland Liberal National Party

item.title: Why Estimates is important
item.description: <Selector xpath="descendant-or-self::*[@class and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' cff-item ') and (@class and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' author-lnp---liberal-national-party '))]" data='<div class="cff-item cff-video-post c...'>
item.author: LNP - Liberal National Party

item.title: Labor's Agriculture Minister said all passengers from Indonesia would be directed to clean shoes. They're not.
item.description:
Labor's Agriculture Minister said all passengers from Indonesia would be directed to clean shoes. They're not.

The Prime Minister must act on the serious threat of foot-and-mouth disease now.
item.author: LNP - Liberal National Party

item.description: <Selector xpath="descendant-or-self::*[@class and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' cff-item ') and (@class and contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' author-lnp---liberal-national-party '))]" data='<div class="cff-item cff-video-post c...'>
item.author: LNP - Liberal National Party
